CustomField.description: Approver for the Non-Standard Terms / Services Margin approval processes on this Quote. Set by segment via the routing flow and used as the `relatedUserField` approver. Replaces the dropped Deal Desk queues for Quote-based review.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The user who approves non-standard terms / services margin on this Quote.
CustomField.label: Deal Desk Approver
